title: santolina pinnata subsp. neapolitana
intro: Santolina pinnata subsp. neapolitana, also known as Lavender Cotton or Cotton Lavender, is a perennial plant in the aster family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Santolina pinnata subsp. neapolitana include soothing digestive issues, relieving stress and anxiety, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to create topical creams, salves, and lotions for skin and wound care.
